SEARCH
Package org.javalabs.jpa.txn

Class TxnEntityManagerDelegate

java.lang.Object
org.javalabs.jpa.txn.TxnEntityManagerDelegate
All Implemented Interfaces:
jakarta.persistence.EntityHandler, jakarta.persistence.EntityManager, AutoCloseable
public class TxnEntityManagerDelegate extends Object implements jakarta.persistence.EntityManager
Delegate wrapper around an EntityManager that adds transaction-aware behavior.

This class is responsible for managing interaction with the underlying EntityManager in the context of active transactions. It may ensure that operations are executed within a transaction boundary and handle life cycle concerns accordingly.

Typical responsibilities include:

  • Delegating persistence operations
  • Ensuring transaction participation
  • Managing entity manager lifecycle (if applicable)

Thread safety: Not thread-safe unless explicitly documented.

Author:
Sudiptasish Chanda
